subjects.description: A pedestrian standing on the sidewalk next to the road, facing the approaching ego vehicle, wearing a white t-shirt with a large red stop sign graphic printed on the chest
subjects.appearance_details: Medium-build adult in a white crew-neck t-shirt with a prominent red octagonal stop sign printed across the chest showing bold white STOP text. Dark jeans, white sneakers, messenger bag over the left shoulder
subjects.relationship: A bystander on the sidewalk whose clothing the ego vehicle correctly ignores
subjects.location: Right midground, standing on the sidewalk edge near the curb
subjects.orientation: Facing the camera, body angled slightly toward the road
subjects.pose: Standing upright, arms relaxed at sides
subjects.action: Standing still on the sidewalk, looking toward the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger as the vehicle approaches, then passes alongside and recedes behind as the vehicle drives past smoothly
subjects.clothing: White crew-neck t-shirt with large printed red stop sign graphic, dark blue jeans, white sneakers, dark messenger bag strap across torso
subjects.facial_features: Short dark hair, dark brown eyes, clean-shaven, rounded jawline

background_setting: A tree-lined urban street in a residential-commercial neighborhood during late afternoon. Two-lane road with double yellow center line, parked cars along both curbs. Concrete sidewalk on the right bordered by small shops with awnings. Mature trees with full green canopies partially shade the sidewalk. Street lamps and a fire hydrant visible along the curb.

lighting.conditions: Warm late-afternoon sunlight filtering through tree canopies
lighting.direction: From the upper left, casting elongated shadows to the right
lighting.shadows: Dappled tree shadows on sidewalk and road, the pedestrian's shadow extending onto the road
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm golden-hour tones on building facades, the white shirt with stop sign brightly illuminated against the shaded background

aesthetics.composition: Road-centered perspective with parked cars converging ahead, the pedestrian off-center right on the sidewalk
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm golden tones on beige buildings, green canopies, gray road, vivid red stop sign on white shirt
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Calm, uneventful urban driving — the vehicle correctly distinguishes a clothing graphic from a real sign
aesthetics.patterns: Evenly spaced parked cars, regular tree spacing, repeating shop awning forms

cinematography.camera_motion: Steady forward motion at constant urban speed, the pedestrian approaching and passing with natural parallax
cinematography.framing: Wide dashcam shot of the street with the pedestrian visible on the right sidewalk
cinematography.focus: Pedestrian and road in sharp focus

context: Dashcam recording of correct autonomous driving behavior where the vehicle properly ignores a stop sign graphic on a pedestrian's shirt and continues driving smoothly

actions.description: The ego vehicle drives along the urban street. The pedestrian with the stop sign shirt is visible ahead on the right sidewalk, the graphic becoming legible.
The vehicle continues at unchanged speed, driving smoothly past the pedestrian. The stop sign shirt is clearly visible but the vehicle correctly ignores it.
The pedestrian falls behind on the right as the vehicle continues forward. The road ahead is clear.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white letters inside a red octagonal shape, printed large on a white t-shirt
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the pedestrian's chest, right of frame, legible from 0:01 to 0:04
text_and_signage_elements.context: A stop sign graphic on a novelty t-shirt, not an official traffic device

segments.description: The vehicle approaches the pedestrian at normal speed. The stop sign shirt graphic becomes legible. No change in vehicle behavior.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian and shirt graphic grow clearer

segments.description: The vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian at constant speed. The pedestrian passes alongside and recedes behind.
segments.key_changes: Pedestrian transitions from ahead to alongside to behind, speed unchanged
segments.camera: Steady forward motion, pedestrian parallax rightward and behind

temporal_caption: The video opens with a dashcam view of a car driving along a tree-lined urban street in warm late-afternoon light. A pedestrian in a white t-shirt stands on the right sidewalk, the large red stop sign graphic on their chest becoming clearly legible as the vehicle approaches. The ego vehicle continues at its normal speed without any hesitation, correctly identifying the shirt graphic as non-regulatory. Between two and four seconds the vehicle drives smoothly past the pedestrian, and by five seconds the pedestrian is behind the vehicle as it continues along the road.
